$schema_note: RDR-008 P3 golden conformance fixture — the qwen_dispatch OPERATOR I/O contract (request shape, response shape, structured error envelope). TS host asserts it in mcp-bridges/qwen-agent-server/tests/contract-conformance.test.ts. This is the fixture-pinnable half of the nexus dispatch-operator spec (the prose half — continuation requirements + one-shot semantics — lives in docs/contracts/qwen-dispatch-operator-contract.md). The RESPONSE is AgentResult, reused VERBATIM from agent-shapes.json (RDR-007) — a qwen_dispatch run returns an AgentResult, nothing new. `turns` now carries the real completed-turn count on a qwen-local SUCCESS run (bead qwen-coprocessor-stack-j2r — PollResult.turns_completed is always-present).

notes.base_commit: REQUIRED. extractPatch ALWAYS diffs against this, never HEAD (a committed agent edit must still be captured). Carried at the tool-input + ExtractPatch parameter boundary, NOT on AgentTask.
notes.worktree: Caller-supplied worktree strategy (default): the caller owns lifecycle (create/cleanup); the executor only runs + extracts.
notes.agent_kind: Selects the dispatcher family (default "qwen-local"). provider_id pins a specific declared provider and overrides agent_kind.

notes.shape: AgentResult (RDR-007, agent-shapes.json) — reused verbatim. A qwen_dispatch run is one agentic run; its result IS an AgentResult.
notes.patch: SOURCE-ONLY (test paths stripped). Contamination stays host-internal — NOT a field of AgentResult (RDR-007 P4b).
notes.turns: Real completed-turn count on qwen-local success (j2r: PollResult.turns_completed is always-present).

error.message: qwen_dispatch: no agent-cli provider matches agentKind="qwen-local".

notes.no_provider: No declared agent-cli provider matches the selector (provider_id pin or agent_kind family).
notes.missing_agent_kind: The selected provider declares no agentKind — a config fix (add agentKind), distinct from unregistered_kind so the caller is not misdirected to register a dispatcher.
notes.unregistered_kind: The provider's agentKind has no registered dispatcher.
notes.shutting_down: Server is shutting down; cannot dispatch (mirrors the spawn-initiating tools' envelope).

executor.notes: STRICTLY ONE-SHOT: a session reaching idle is TERMINAL (the agent finished its single self-contained task). Nexus MUST NOT build a resume-the-executor path against this operator. Suspend/resume/continuations are a nexus ENGINE concern, not an executor capability.
